text:
### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The location-based services application utilizes the Google Maps API for mapping and geolocation features.

### Response:
[{"title": "Google Maps API Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate Google Maps API to enable mapping and geolocation features in the location-based services application.

### Technical Description
The application will utilize the Google Maps API to retrieve and display maps, as well as provide geolocation capabilities. This integration will require the setup of API credentials and configuration of the API client.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and setup Google Maps API credentials
- [ ] Implement Google Maps API client in the application
- [ ] Configure API client for mapping and geolocation features", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The payment processing system connects with the Stripe API for handling online transactions.

### Response:
[{"title": "Payment Processing System - Stripe API Integration", "body": "### Objective
Implement a payment processing system that connects with the Stripe API for handling online transactions.

### Technical Description
The system will require API keys from Stripe to authenticate and process payments. The system will also need to handle errors and exceptions when interacting with the Stripe API.

### Tasks
- [ ] Set up Stripe API keys and authentication
- [ ] Implement payment processing logic
- [ ] Handle errors and exceptions when interacting with the Stripe API
- [ ] Test payment processing functionality", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The helpdesk software is integrated with the Zendesk API for creating and managing support tickets.

### Response:
[{"title": "Zendesk API Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the helpdesk software with the Zendesk API for creating and managing support tickets.

### Technical Description
The integration will allow users to create, read, update, and delete support tickets using the Zendesk API. This will require implementing API calls to the Zendesk API and handling API responses.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implement API calls to create, read, update, and delete support tickets.
- [ ] Handle API responses and errors.
- [ ] Test the integration with the Zendesk API.

", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Zendesk API Configuration", "body": "### Objective
Configure the helpdesk software to use the Zendesk API for creating and managing support tickets.

### Technical Description
This will require setting up the API keys and authentication with the Zendesk API.

### Tasks
- [ ] Set up API keys and authentication with the Zendesk API.
- [ ] Configure the helpdesk software to use the Zendesk API.
- [ ] Test the configuration.

", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The social media management tool connects with the Twitter API for posting and retrieving tweets.

### Response:
[{"title": "Twitter API Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the Twitter API to enable posting and retrieving tweets.

### Technical Description
The social media management tool will need to authenticate with the Twitter API and make API calls to post and retrieve tweets.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implement Twitter API authentication and authorization.
- [ ] Develop API calls for posting and retrieving tweets.
- [ ] Handle Twitter API rate limits and errors.
- [ ] Test API functionality with sample tweets.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Twitter API Authentication", "body": "### Objective
Implement Twitter API authentication and authorization.

### Technical Description
The social media management tool will need to authenticate with the Twitter API using OAuth 2.0.

### Tasks
- [ ] Set up Twitter API developer account.
- [ ] Implement OAuth 2.0 authentication and authorization.
- [ ] Handle Twitter API authentication errors.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Twitter API Posting", "body": "### Objective
Develop API calls for posting tweets.

### Technical Description
The social media management tool will need to make API calls to the Twitter API to post tweets.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implement API call for posting tweets.
- [ ] Handle Twitter API posting errors.
- [ ] Test API posting functionality with sample tweets.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Twitter API Retrieval", "body": "### Objective
Develop API calls for retrieving tweets.

### Technical Description
The social media management tool will need to make API calls to the Twitter API to retrieve tweets.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implement API call for retrieving tweets.
- [ ] Handle Twitter API retrieval errors.
- [ ] Test API retrieval functionality with sample tweets.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Twitter API Rate Limits", "body": "### Objective
Implement handling for Twitter API rate limits.

### Technical Description
The social media management tool will need to handle Twitter API rate limits to prevent errors.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implement rate limit handling for Twitter API posting and retrieval.
- [ ] Test rate limit handling for Twitter API posting and retrieval.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The email marketing platform integrates with the Mailchimp API for managing email campaigns and subscriber lists.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com Mailchimp API", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar a plataforma de marketing por email com a API do Mailchimp para gerenciar campanhas de email e listas de inscritos.

### Descrição Técnica
A integração será feita utilizando a API do Mailchimp para autenticar e gerenciar as campanhas de email e listas de inscritos. É necessário implementar uma camada de abstração para encapsular as chamadas à API do Mailchimp e lidar com erros e exceções.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implementar autenticação com a API do Mailchimp.
- [ ] Desenvolver uma camada de abstração para encapsular as chamadas à API do Mailchimp.
- [ ] Implementar lógica para gerenciar campanhas de email e listas de inscritos.
- [ ] Testar a integração com diferentes cenários de uso.

# Labels: backend, api", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Autenticação com Mailchimp API", "body": "### Objetivo
Autenticar a plataforma de marketing por email com a API do Mailchimp.

### Descrição Técnica
É necessário implementar uma autenticação segura para que a plataforma possa acessar a API do Mailchimp e realizar operações de gerenciamento de campanhas de email e listas de inscritos.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implementar autenticação com API do Mailchimp.
- [ ] Testar a autenticação com diferentes cenários de uso.

# Labels: backend, security", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The human resources management software connects with an Oracle Database for storing employee information.

### Response:
[{"title": "HR Software - Oracle Database Connection", "body": "### Objective
Establish a connection between the human resources management software and an Oracle Database for storing employee information.

### Technical Description
The software will use JDBC to connect to the Oracle Database and retrieve employee data. The database schema will need to be designed to accommodate the software's requirements.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design Oracle Database schema
- [ ] Implement JDBC connection to Oracle Database
- [ ] Test database connection and data retrieval", "labels": ["backend", "database"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The analytics platform is integrated with an Elasticsearch database for efficient indexing and searching of data.

### Response:
[{"title": "Elasticsearch Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the analytics platform with Elasticsearch for efficient data indexing and searching.

### Technical Description
The integration will enable efficient querying and retrieval of data, improving the overall performance and scalability of the platform.

### Tasks
- [ ] Set up Elasticsearch cluster
- [ ] Configure API to interact with Elasticsearch
- [ ] Implement data indexing and searching logic", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Data Indexing and Searching", "body": "### Objective
Implement data indexing and searching functionality using Elasticsearch.

### Technical Description
The implementation will involve designing and implementing data models, indexing data, and creating search queries to retrieve relevant data.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design data models and schema
- [ ] Implement data indexing and searching logic
- [ ] Test data indexing and searching functionality", "labels": ["backend", "database"]}, {"title": "Platform Performance and Scalability", "body": "### Objective
Improve the performance and scalability of the analytics platform by integrating with Elasticsearch.

### Technical Description
The integration will enable efficient querying and retrieval of data, improving the overall performance and scalability of the platform.

### Tasks
- [ ] Analyze platform performance and scalability
- [ ] Identify areas for improvement
- [ ] Implement improvements and test results", "labels": ["backend", "performance"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The financial management system connects with a Google Cloud Firestore database for storing transaction records.

### Response:
[{"title": "Firebase Database Integration", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrate the financial management system with a Google Cloud Firestore database for storing transaction records.

### Descrição Técnica
This issue involves setting up a Firebase Realtime Database or Cloud Firestore database to store transaction records. The database should be designed to handle a large volume of data and ensure data consistency.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research Firebase Realtime Database and Cloud Firestore options.
- [ ] Set up a test database for the financial management system.
- [ ] Implement data modeling and schema design for the database.
- [ ] Integrate the database with the financial management system.
- [ ] Test the database integration and ensure data consistency.", "labels": ["backend", "database"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The marketing automation platform integrates with a Microsoft SQL Server database for storing lead information.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração da API com Banco de Dados Microsoft SQL Server", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar a API do marketing automation platform com o Banco de Dados Microsoft SQL Server para armazenamento de informações de leads.

### Descrição Técnica
A API utilizará o padrão RESTful para comunicação com o banco de dados. Serão necessárias APIs para CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) de lead information.

### Tasks
- [ ] Conectar à API do Microsoft SQL Server
- [ ] Implementar APIs para CRUD de lead information
- [ ] Testar a integração da API com o banco de dados
- [ ] Documentar a integração da API com o banco de dados", "labels": ["backend", "api", "database", "integration"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The IoT data processing system utilizes a Cassandra database for storing large volumes of sensor data.

### Response:
[{"title": "Cassandra Database Configuration", "body": "### Objective
Configure Cassandra database for IoT data processing system.

### Technical Description
The system will store large volumes of sensor data in a Cassandra database. The database will be configured to handle high traffic and data volume.

### Tasks
- [ ] Review Cassandra configuration guidelines.
- [ ] Configure Cassandra database for high traffic and data volume.
- [ ] Test database performance.
- [ ] Document database configuration.

Labels: [database, backend, infrastructure]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "API Development for IoT Data Processing", "body": "### Objective
Develop an API for IoT data processing system.

### Technical Description
The API will be responsible for receiving and processing sensor data from IoT devices. The API will utilize Cassandra database for storing data.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design API architecture.
- [ ] Develop API using a suitable programming language.
- [ ] Integrate API with Cassandra database.
- [ ] Test API functionality.

Labels: [api, backend, infrastructure]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The project management software connects to an Amazon DynamoDB database for storing task and project data.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com Banco de Dados", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar o software de gerenciamento de projetos com um banco de dados NoSQL (Amazon DynamoDB) para armazenar dados de tarefas e projetos.

### Descrição Técnica
O software deve ser configurado para se conectar ao banco de dados DynamoDB e realizar operações de leitura e escrita de dados. Isso inclui criar tabelas no banco de dados e definir schema de dados.

### Tasks
- [ ] Conectar o software ao banco de dados DynamoDB.
- [ ] Criar tabelas no banco de dados para armazenar dados de tarefas e projetos.
- [ ] Definir schema de dados para as tabelas do banco de dados.
- [ ] Implementar operações de leitura e escrita de dados no banco de dados.", "labels": ["backend", "database"]}, {"title": "Autenticação e Autorização", "body": "### Objetivo
Implementar autenticação e autorização para o software de gerenciamento de projetos.

### Descrição Técnica
O software deve ser configurado para exigir autenticação e autorização para acesso a recursos. Isso inclui criar usuários, definir perfis de usuário e implementar validação de tokens.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implementar autenticação com AWS Cognito.
- [ ] Definir perfis de usuário e criar usuários.
- [ ] Implementar autorização com AWS IAM.
- [ ] Validação de tokens para autenticação.", "labels": ["backend", "security"]}, {"title": "Integração com API", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar o software de gerenciamento de projetos com API para gerenciamento de tarefas e projetos.

### Descrição Técnica
O software deve ser configurado para se conectar à API e realizar operações de leitura e escrita de dados. Isso inclui criar endpoints para operações de leitura e escrita de dados.

### Tasks
- [ ] Conectar o software à API para gerenciamento de tarefas e projetos.
- [ ] Criar endpoints para operações de leitura e escrita de dados.
- [ ] Implementar chamadas à API para leitura e escrita de dados.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The e-commerce platform is integrated with a Redis cache for faster product retrieval and improved performance.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integrate E-commerce Platform with Redis Cache", "body": "### Objective
Improve product retrieval performance and overall platform speed.

### Technical Description
Integrate the e-commerce platform with a Redis cache to store frequently accessed product data. This will enable faster product retrieval and improve overall platform performance.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implement Redis cache integration with the e-commerce platform.
- [ ] Test and optimize Redis cache performance.
- [ ] Monitor and analyze Redis cache usage and performance metrics.
", "labels": ["backend", "api", "performance"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The content management system (CMS) utilizes a MongoDB database for managing unstructured content.

### Response:
[{"title": "Database Migration", "body": "### Objective
Migrate the CMS to use a MongoDB database for managing unstructured content.

### Technical Description
The current database system is not optimized for storing and retrieving unstructured content. The MongoDB database will improve the performance and scalability of the CMS.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and design the database schema for MongoDB.
- [ ] Migrate the existing content to the new database.
- [ ] Update the CMS to use the new MongoDB database.", "labels": ["backend", "database"]}, {"title": "API Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the CMS with the MongoDB database using RESTful APIs.

### Technical Description
The APIs will provide a layer of abstraction between the CMS and the database, allowing for easier data retrieval and manipulation.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the RESTful APIs for data retrieval and manipulation.
- [ ] Test the APIs with the CMS to ensure seamless integration.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Content Storage", "body": "### Objective
Design and implement a storage solution for unstructured content within the MongoDB database.

### Technical Description
The storage solution will provide a scalable and efficient way to store and retrieve unstructured content, such as images and videos.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and design the storage solution.
- [ ] Implement the storage solution using MongoDB.
- [ ] Test the storage solution with sample data.", "labels": ["backend", "database"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The customer relationship management (CRM) platform connects with a MySQL database for storing customer data.

### Response:
[{"title": "CRM Database Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the CRM platform with a MySQL database for storing customer data.

### Technical Description
The platform will connect to the MySQL database using a JDBC driver, and will use a MySQL connection pool to manage database connections.

### Tasks
- [ ] Create a MySQL connection pool using a Java library (e.g. HikariCP).
- [ ] Implement database connection management using the connection pool.
- [ ] Write SQL queries for creating and updating customer data.
- [ ] Integrate the database connection with the CRM platform API.
- [ ] Test the integration with sample data.", "labels": ["backend", "database"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The inventory management system integrates with a PostgreSQL database for storing product information.

### Response:
[{"title": "Inventory Management System Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the inventory management system with a PostgreSQL database.

### Technical Description
Design and implement the data model for storing product information. Ensure seamless data transfer between the system and the database.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research PostgreSQL database connection options.
- [ ] Design and implement the data model for storing product information.
- [ ] Implement data transfer between the system and the database.
- [ ] Test the integration to ensure data accuracy and consistency.

Labels: [backend, api, database]", "labels": ["backend", "api", "database"]}]
